target: Set E Audio Generation + QB Full Tests UI Redesign + Turkish to English Translation

summary.overall_result: All 14 backend tests pass. Set E listening audio (4 parts) returns 200. All 8 academic sets (A-H) audio part 1 returns 200. Turkish text in QuestionBank.js fixed (3 instances translated to English). Code review confirms QB Full Tests tab has correct UI structure: Cambridge tests section, IELTS Practice Tests section with Academic IELTS card (8 sets in 4-column grid) and General Training card.

features_tested.details: GET /api/full-test/audio/stream/academic_set_e_01/listening/1-4 all return 200 with audio/mpeg content
Sets A-H part 1 audio all return 200: academic_set_a_01 through academic_set_h_01
API returns all 8 sets: academic_set_a_01 through academic_set_h_01

features_tested.feature: QB Full Tests tab - IELTS Practice Tests section
features_tested.details: Section shows 'IELTS Practice Tests' header with 'AI-generated full tests with real exam visuals' subtitle

features_tested.feature: QB Full Tests tab - Academic IELTS card
features_tested.details: Card contains 8 set cards (A-H) with proper data-testid attributes in 4-column grid

features_tested.feature: QB Full Tests tab - Academic set cards clickable
features_tested.details: Each card has onClick to open test modal or navigate to /full-test?type=academic&set={id}

features_tested.feature: QB Full Tests tab - General Training card
